name: Travala Booking
description: Travala hotel booking integration with MCP and skills — by GoPlausible

setup.summary: Sync workspace memory, register travala-mcp (remote, http) and payments-mcp (Coinbase, stdio) with mcporter, and add the plugin to OpenClaw's allow list.

postSetup.message: Restart the OpenClaw gateway to apply changes. travala-mcp and payments-mcp are auto-registered in ~/.mcporter/mcporter.json on first load. Hotel payment uses USDC on Base via the x402 flow — install the Coinbase Payments MCP server with `npx @coinbase/payments-mcp` so `make_http_request_with_x402` is available to complete bookings.
